SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DANIEL B LANDRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS. IS PRESENT AND APPEARING ON ITS BEHALF IS LINDA YOAKUM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LINDA YOAKUM FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS. INCORPORATED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANDRY, DANIEL B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS. INCORPORATED $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 BECAUSE MLK-MG FAILED TO RESPOND TO MR.LANDRY'S REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF HIS REQUEST. LINDA YOAKUM HAS SERVED ON THE BOARD FOR THREE YEARS. THEREFORE, HER TERM HAS EXPIRED AND THERE SHALL BE A NEW ELECTION TO ELECT FOUR NEW BOARD MEMBERS PER THE TERMS OF THE BY LAWS. THE ELECTIONS HELD IN JANUARY & FEBRUARY, 2025 WERE NOT PROPERLY HELD AND THE ELECTIONS WERE NOT PROPERLY HELD AND THE ELECTIONS WERE NOT HELD PER THE BY LAWS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DEFENDANT/APPELLANT MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS. INCORPORATED APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MERCEDES GAVIN, ESQ. JUDGE: ANDREW Y S CHENG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (613)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LANDRY, DANIEL B RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE APTS. INCORPORATED $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, JUDGEMENT AFFIRMED IN PART AND REVERSED IN PART. ALL OTHER RELIEF ORDERED ON 2/28/25 ARE NOT AUTHORIZED UNDER CCP SECTION 116.20(A) AND (B). JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF APPELLANTS. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
